description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named build_image that uses the docker:git Docker image and the docker:dind service. The job logs in to registry.gitlab.com with the gitlab-ci-token and $CI_BUILD_TOKEN, builds a Docker image tagged registry.gitlab.com/showcheap/android-ci:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, and pushes it to the same registry. It runs in the default stage and has no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
